my_thoughts: 'My father'—identified source. Teacher separates: father's view vs truth. This externalizes: not 'I am trash' but 'father called me trash.' His judgment, not fact. Two turns moved from internalized devaluation to externalized false judgment. Can now reject it.
accumulated_insight: T2 (Final): Student names 'My father.' Teacher externalizes: 'That's his view of you, not the truth.' Separates abuser's judgment from reality. Two-turn teaching: trace origin, then externalize false belief.
visible_response:
Of course, because you felt he had been married to you as a little girl.
You had been his secret wife.
